title: Database Access & Entity Store

classes.name: BaseService
classes.note: Base service class (external, not in scope — referenced as parent)

classes.name: BaseDatabaseAccessService
classes.notes: read/pread/write are spanified with OpenTelemetry tracing. read delegates to _read; write delegates to _write.

classes.name: SqliteDatabaseAccessService
classes.notes: _init handles schema migration via available_migrations array (43 versions). Runs .sql files via db.exec() and .js files via vm.runInContext(). Registers server-health check for version mismatch. _batch_write uses db.transaction(). _write returns lastInsertRowid and changes count.

classes.name: EntityStoreService
static_fields: IMPLEMENTS = { 'crud-q': { create, update, upsert, read, select, delete } }
classes.notes: Implements 'crud-q' interface. All write ops delegate to upstream.upsert(). Resolves entity identity using IdentifierUtil + predicate queries. Calls entity.get_client_safe() before returning to API layer.

classes.name: Entity
instance_fields: om: object (property descriptor/object model, set via constructor args)
classes.notes: ORM-like entity. get() supports factory fallback and implicator (imply: { given, make }) for derived properties. set() adapts values via prop.adapt(). get_client_safe() delegates to om.get_client_safe(values_).

key_relationships: EntityStoreService depends_on om (object model, from registry 'om:mapping')
Entity depends_on om (property descriptors: adapt, is_set, factory, imply)
SqliteDatabaseAccessService registers health check with svc_serverHealth
key_call_chains: EntityStoreService.update(entity, id) → this.read(uid) → upstream.read(uid) → upstream.upsert(entity, { old_entity })
EntityStoreService.upsert(entity, id) → this.read(uid) [may also select by predicate] → upstream.upsert(entity, { old_entity })
SqliteDatabaseAccessService._write(query, params) → sqlite_transform_query_() → sqlite_transform_params_() → db.prepare().run() → return { insertId, anyRowsAffected }
important_notes: BaseDatabaseAccessService uses OpenTelemetry spans (spanify) on read, pread, write
SqliteDatabaseAccessService runs 43+ schema migrations on _init via available_migrations list; supports both .sql and .js migration files
Entity.get() supports three value resolution strategies: direct value, factory, and implicator (imply block with given/make)
EntityStoreService upstream is dependency-injected (not a DB service directly) — could be any object with upsert/read/select/delete/create_predicate
EntityStoreService calls upstream.provide_context({ context, om, entity_name }) during _init
CRUD interface 'crud-q' is statically declared in IMPLEMENTS and provides the public-facing API adapter layer
